title: Legal English Basics
description: Contract vocabulary: party, clause, term, breach, liable, waiver.
summary_pt_br: Inglês jurídico: 'parties agree', 'neither party shall', 'in the event of breach', 'governed by'.

scenes.subtitle_en: Contract vocabulary: party, clause, term, breach, liable, waiver.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Inglês jurídico: 'parties agree', 'neither party shall', 'in the event of breach', 'governed by'.

scenes.text_en: Contract vocabulary: party, clause, term, breach, liable, waiver. Today's focus: legal english basics. Both parties agree to the terms outlined below.
scenes.text_pt: Inglês jurídico: 'parties agree', 'neither party shall', 'in the event of breach', 'governed by'. Foco de hoje: legal english basics. Ambas as partes concordam com os termos abaixo.

scenes.title: Legal English Basics
scenes.body_en: Common patterns: 'The parties agree that...', 'Neither party shall...', 'In the event of a breach...', 'This agreement is governed by...'
scenes.body_pt: Inglês jurídico: 'parties agree', 'neither party shall', 'in the event of breach', 'governed by'.

examples.en: Both parties agree to the terms outlined below.
examples.pt: Ambas as partes concordam com os termos abaixo.

examples.en: In the event of a breach, the contract terminates immediately.
examples.pt: Em caso de descumprimento, o contrato é rescindido.

examples.en: This agreement shall be governed by Brazilian law.
examples.pt: Este acordo será regido pela lei brasileira.

exercise.question: Complete: "Both parties agree to the terms ___ below."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Both parties agree to the terms outlined below."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Ambas as partes concordam com os termos abaixo.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
In the event of a breach, the contract terminates immediately.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "In the event of a breach, the contract terminates immediately."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Em caso de descumprimento, o contrato é rescindido.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Legal English Basics — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre legal english basics. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Joca, summarize this contract in plain English.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Both parties agree to a six-month project.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What happens if the client doesn't pay?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: In the event of breach, the agreement ends.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Who is liable for data loss?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The vendor is liable only for gross negligence.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Can either side waive their rights?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: No waiver applies unless signed in writing.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: This agreement is governed by Brazilian law.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Legal English: boring on purpose, precise by design.

scenes.title: Reviewing the contract
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize the main clauses in plain English. Use at least three legal terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the small conference room, Joca and the vendor sat down to review the final draft clause by clause.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Both parties agree to a six-month engagement with milestones reviewed every thirty days.

paragraphs.speaker: Vendor
paragraphs.en: In the event of breach, the non-breaching party may terminate with fifteen days' notice.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: The vendor shall only be liable for direct damages arising from gross negligence.

paragraphs.speaker: Vendor
paragraphs.en: This agreement is governed by Brazilian law and resolved in the courts of São Paulo.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: A good contract, their lawyer reminded them, is not about winning — it's about preventing surprises.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Legal English Basics". Contract vocabulary: party, clause, term, breach, liable, waiver. Both parties agree to the terms outlined below. In the event of a breach, the contract terminates immediately. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Legal English Basics". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Legal English Basics".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: BBC News · Learning English
sources.pt_hint: Análise de notícias reais da BBC.

sources.label: TED Talks with subtitles
sources.pt_hint: Palestras reais com legenda — ouça, leia, repita.

sources.label: Cambridge Dictionary · thesaurus
sources.pt_hint: Sinônimos com exemplos — essencial em B2+.
